flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 28% at Southwest Baptist University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.3k vs 1.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southwest Baptist University rose 24% between 2006 and 2009 ($13.3k → $16.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Southwest Baptist University fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southwest Baptist University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.1k → $30.6k).
